title: Midnight Boudin Wraps
description: A fusion of Chinese flavors with a twist on traditional breakfast boudin. Crispy fried wraps filled with savory boudin and topped with a funky sauce.
instructions: 1. Cut the Midnight Wrap into 4 equal pieces.
2. Slice the Boudin Blanc into thin strips.
3. Heat the Sesame Oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
4. Fry the wrapped boudin until crispy.
5. Apply the Funky Sauce on top of the boudin.
6. Season with Craving Salt to taste.
